faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Tompkinsville?
faqs.answer: Tompkinsville residents most frequently encounter pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Pavement ants are especially common near sidewalks and building foundations, while carpenter ants often infest older wooden structures. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to ant problems in Tompkinsville?

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 ant control service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive ant control service includes a thorough inspection, identification of ant species and entry points, targeted interior and exterior treatment, nest elimination, and preventative barrier application. The final price depends on your property size, infestation severity, and treatment complexity. We provide free quotes before any work begins.
